title: Implement project-local discovery and filters
description: Include project-local alongside project; add --no-local and --local-only filters and mark source in index.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented project-local inclusion and --no-local/--local-only filters in Python and Rust list/ready paths. Added local discovery helper in Rust, updated tests and coverage. Tests: python -m pytest --cov=taskulus --cov-report=term-missing python/tests; cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --tests
